user.title: Connect to NeoVolt (AlphaESS) System
user.description: Enter the connection details for your AlphaESS inverter.

data_description.host: The IP address of your AlphaESS inverter on your local network.
data_description.slave_id: The Modbus slave ID of your inverter (default: 85).
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the inverter for new data, in seconds (5-300, default: 10).

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the inverter. Check IP address and port.

total_power_grid.name: Total Power Grid
total_power_grid.description: Total active power at the grid connection point. Positive means consuming from grid, negative means feeding to grid.

grid_power_phase_a.name: Grid Power Phase A
grid_power_phase_a.description: Active power on grid phase A. Positive = consuming, negative = feeding.

grid_power_phase_b.name: Grid Power Phase B
grid_power_phase_b.description: Active power on grid phase B. Positive = consuming, negative = feeding.

grid_power_phase_c.name: Grid Power Phase C
grid_power_phase_c.description: Active power on grid phase C. Positive = consuming, negative = feeding.

grid_voltage_phase_a.name: Grid Voltage Phase A
grid_voltage_phase_a.description: AC voltage measured at the grid meter on phase A.

grid_voltage_phase_b.name: Grid Voltage Phase B
grid_voltage_phase_b.description: AC voltage measured at the grid meter on phase B.

grid_voltage_phase_c.name: Grid Voltage Phase C
grid_voltage_phase_c.description: AC voltage measured at the grid meter on phase C.

grid_current_phase_a.name: Grid Current Phase A
grid_current_phase_a.description: AC current flowing through the grid meter on phase A.

grid_current_phase_b.name: Grid Current Phase B
grid_current_phase_b.description: AC current flowing through the grid meter on phase B.

grid_current_phase_c.name: Grid Current Phase C
grid_current_phase_c.description: AC current flowing through the grid meter on phase C.

grid_frequency_meter.name: Grid Frequency (Meter)
grid_frequency_meter.description: AC frequency measured at the grid meter.

total_power_pvmeter.name: Total Power PV Meter
total_power_pvmeter.description: Total active power measured at the PV meter.

total_power_inverter.name: Total Power Inverter
total_power_inverter.description: Total AC output power of the inverter across all phases.

power_inverter_l1.name: Power Inverter L1
power_inverter_l1.description: AC output power of the inverter on phase L1.

power_inverter_l2.name: Power Inverter L2
power_inverter_l2.description: AC output power of the inverter on phase L2.

power_inverter_l3.name: Power Inverter L3
power_inverter_l3.description: AC output power of the inverter on phase L3.

inverter_voltage_l1.name: Inverter Voltage L1
inverter_voltage_l1.description: AC output voltage of the inverter on phase L1.

inverter_voltage_l2.name: Inverter Voltage L2
inverter_voltage_l2.description: AC output voltage of the inverter on phase L2.

inverter_voltage_l3.name: Inverter Voltage L3
inverter_voltage_l3.description: AC output voltage of the inverter on phase L3.

inverter_current_l1.name: Inverter Current L1
inverter_current_l1.description: AC output current of the inverter on phase L1.

inverter_current_l2.name: Inverter Current L2
inverter_current_l2.description: AC output current of the inverter on phase L2.

inverter_current_l3.name: Inverter Current L3
inverter_current_l3.description: AC output current of the inverter on phase L3.

grid_frequency.name: Grid Frequency
grid_frequency.description: AC grid frequency measured at the inverter output.

inverter_mode.name: Inverter Mode
inverter_mode.description: Current operating mode: Wait, Online, UPS, Bypass, Fault, DC, Check, Self Test, or Update.

power_inverter_backup_total.name: Power Inverter Backup Total
power_inverter_backup_total.description: Total backup (UPS) output power across all phases.

power_inverter_backup_l1.name: Power Inverter Backup L1
power_inverter_backup_l1.description: Backup (UPS) output power on phase L1.

power_inverter_backup_l2.name: Power Inverter Backup L2
power_inverter_backup_l2.description: Backup (UPS) output power on phase L2.

power_inverter_backup_l3.name: Power Inverter Backup L3
power_inverter_backup_l3.description: Backup (UPS) output power on phase L3.

power_string_1.name: Power PV String 1
power_string_1.description: DC power output from PV string 1 (connector PV1 on inverter).

power_string_2.name: Power PV String 2
power_string_2.description: DC power output from PV string 2 (connector PV3 on inverter).

power_string_3.name: Power PV String 3
power_string_3.description: DC power output from PV string 3 (connector PV2 on inverter).

power_string_4.name: Power PV String 4
power_string_4.description: DC power output from PV string 4 (connector PV4 on inverter).

energy_feed_to_grid.name: Total Energy Feed to Grid
energy_feed_to_grid.description: Cumulative energy exported to the grid, measured at the grid meter. Use for Energy Dashboard 'Return to Grid'.

energy_consumption_from_grid.name: Total Energy Consumption from Grid
energy_consumption_from_grid.description: Cumulative energy imported from the grid, measured at the grid meter. Use for Energy Dashboard 'Grid Consumption'.

energy_feed_to_grid_pvmeter.name: Total Energy Feed to Grid (PV Meter)
energy_feed_to_grid_pvmeter.description: Cumulative energy exported to the grid, measured at the PV meter.

energy_consumption_from_grid_pvmeter.name: Total Energy Consumption from Grid (PV Meter)
energy_consumption_from_grid_pvmeter.description: Cumulative energy imported from the grid, measured at the PV meter.

energy_charge_battery.name: Total Energy Charge Battery
energy_charge_battery.description: Cumulative energy charged into the battery. Use for Energy Dashboard 'Battery Charge'.

energy_discharge_battery.name: Total Energy Discharge Battery
energy_discharge_battery.description: Cumulative energy discharged from the battery. Use for Energy Dashboard 'Battery Discharge'.

energy_charge_battery_from_grid.name: Total Energy Charge Battery from Grid
energy_charge_battery_from_grid.description: Cumulative energy charged into the battery specifically from grid power.

energy_from_pv.name: Total Energy from PV
energy_from_pv.description: Cumulative energy generated by the inverter from PV panels. Use for Energy Dashboard 'Solar Production'.

pv_inverter_energy.name: PV Inverter Energy
pv_inverter_energy.description: Cumulative energy from a separate PV grid inverter (if installed).

system_total_pv_energy.name: System Total PV Energy
system_total_pv_energy.description: Cumulative total PV energy across the entire system (hybrid + grid inverter).

battery_soc.name: Battery State of Charge
battery_soc.description: Current battery charge level as a percentage.

battery_soh.name: Battery State of Health
battery_soh.description: Battery health indicator. 100% = new condition, decreases with age and cycles.

battery_voltage.name: Battery Voltage
battery_voltage.description: DC voltage of the battery pack.

battery_current.name: Battery Current
battery_current.description: DC current flowing to/from the battery. Positive = charging, negative = discharging.

battery_power.name: Battery Power
battery_power.description: Power flowing to/from the battery. Positive = charging, negative = discharging.

battery_min_cell_temp.name: Battery Min Cell Temperature
battery_min_cell_temp.description: Temperature of the coldest cell in the battery pack.

battery_max_cell_temp.name: Battery Max Cell Temperature
battery_max_cell_temp.description: Temperature of the hottest cell in the battery pack.

battery_max_charge_current.name: Battery Max Charge Current
battery_max_charge_current.description: Maximum current the BMS allows for charging at this moment.

battery_max_discharge_current.name: Battery Max Discharge Current
battery_max_discharge_current.description: Maximum current the BMS allows for discharging at this moment.

battery_max_charge_power.name: Battery Max Charge Power
battery_max_charge_power.description: Maximum power the BMS allows for charging at this moment.

battery_max_discharge_power.name: Battery Max Discharge Power
battery_max_discharge_power.description: Maximum power the BMS allows for discharging at this moment.

battery_capacity.name: Battery Capacity
battery_capacity.description: Rated capacity of the installed battery pack.

battery_remaining_time.name: Battery Remaining Time
battery_remaining_time.description: Estimated minutes until the battery is fully charged or discharged at the current rate.

battery_status.name: Battery Status
battery_status.description: Battery status code from the BMS. Refer to AlphaESS documentation for code meanings.

battery_relay_status.name: Battery Relay Status
battery_relay_status.description: State of battery charge/discharge relays: Disconnected, Discharge Only, Charge Only, or Normal (both connected).

battery_ups_soc.name: UPS SOC Reserve
battery_ups_soc.description: Current UPS reserve SOC setting. Battery will not discharge below this level in normal operation.

max_feed_to_grid.name: Max Feed to Grid
max_feed_to_grid.description: Current maximum feed-in rate to grid as a percentage of installed PV capacity.

inverter_fault_1.name: Inverter Fault 1
inverter_fault_1.description: Primary inverter fault code. 0 = no fault.

inverter_fault_2.name: Inverter Fault 2
inverter_fault_2.description: Secondary inverter fault code. 0 = no fault.

inverter_warning_1.name: Inverter Warning 1
inverter_warning_1.description: Primary inverter warning code. 0 = no warning.

inverter_warning_2.name: Inverter Warning 2
inverter_warning_2.description: Secondary inverter warning code. 0 = no warning.

inverter_extended_fault_1.name: Inverter Extended Fault 1
inverter_extended_fault_1.description: Extended inverter fault code 1. 0 = no fault.

inverter_extended_fault_2.name: Inverter Extended Fault 2
inverter_extended_fault_2.description: Extended inverter fault code 2. 0 = no fault.

system_fault.name: System Fault
system_fault.description: System-level fault code from the EMS. 0 = no fault.

ems_version_high.name: EMS Version High
ems_version_high.description: Major version number of the EMS firmware.

ems_version_middle.name: EMS Version Middle
ems_version_middle.description: Minor version number of the EMS firmware.

ems_version_low.name: EMS Version Low
ems_version_low.description: Patch version number of the EMS firmware.

grid_power_factor.name: Grid Power Factor
grid_power_factor.description: Power factor at the grid connection. 1.00 = purely resistive load.

battery_min_cell_voltage.name: Battery Min Cell Voltage
battery_min_cell_voltage.description: Lowest individual cell voltage in the battery pack. Useful for monitoring cell balance.

battery_max_cell_voltage.name: Battery Max Cell Voltage
battery_max_cell_voltage.description: Highest individual cell voltage in the battery pack. Large gap between min/max indicates imbalance.

pv_voltage_a.name: PV Meter Voltage Phase A
pv_voltage_a.description: AC voltage measured at the PV meter on phase A.

pv_capacity.name: PV Capacity
pv_capacity.description: Configured PV system capacity in watts.

grid_power_offset.name: Grid Power Offset
grid_power_offset.description: Calibration offset for grid power reading (-500 to +500W). Adjusts the measurement if your CT clamp reads slightly off.

dispatch_active_power_sensor.name: Dispatch Active Power
dispatch_active_power_sensor.description: Current dispatch active power setting. Positive = discharge, negative = charge.

dispatch_reactive_power_sensor.name: Dispatch Reactive Power
dispatch_reactive_power_sensor.description: Current dispatch reactive power setting in var.

dispatch_soc_sensor.name: Dispatch SOC
dispatch_soc_sensor.description: SOC limit configured for the current dispatch operation.

dispatch_time_sensor.name: Dispatch Time
dispatch_time_sensor.description: Remaining duration of the current dispatch operation in seconds.

target_soc.name: Target SOC
target_soc.description: Minimum battery state of charge reserve. The battery will not discharge below this level in normal operation (UPS/backup reserve).

max_feed_to_grid_control.name: Max Feed to Grid Rate
max_feed_to_grid_control.description: Maximum percentage of installed PV capacity that can be fed into the grid. Set to 0 to prevent all grid export.

charge_cut_soc.name: Charge Cut SOC
charge_cut_soc.description: Stop charging the battery when SOC reaches this percentage during timed charging.

discharge_start_time_1.name: Discharge Start Time 1
discharge_start_time_1.description: Hour (0-23) when timed discharge period 1 begins.

discharge_stop_time_1.name: Discharge Stop Time 1
discharge_stop_time_1.description: Hour (0-23) when timed discharge period 1 ends.

discharge_start_time_2.name: Discharge Start Time 2
discharge_start_time_2.description: Hour (0-23) when timed discharge period 2 begins.

discharge_stop_time_2.name: Discharge Stop Time 2
discharge_stop_time_2.description: Hour (0-23) when timed discharge period 2 ends.

charge_start_time_1.name: Charge Start Time 1
charge_start_time_1.description: Hour (0-23) when timed charge period 1 begins.

charge_stop_time_1.name: Charge Stop Time 1
charge_stop_time_1.description: Hour (0-23) when timed charge period 1 ends.

charge_start_time_2.name: Charge Start Time 2
charge_start_time_2.description: Hour (0-23) when timed charge period 2 begins.

charge_stop_time_2.name: Charge Stop Time 2
charge_stop_time_2.description: Hour (0-23) when timed charge period 2 ends.

dispatch_active_power.name: Dispatch Active Power
dispatch_active_power.description: Force battery to charge (negative watts) or discharge (positive watts) at a specific power level. Requires Dispatch Start = On.

dispatch_reactive_power.name: Dispatch Reactive Power
dispatch_reactive_power.description: Set reactive power output in var during dispatch. Typically left at 0 for residential use.

dispatch_soc.name: Dispatch SOC Limit
dispatch_soc.description: SOC limit for the dispatch operation. Charging stops at this SOC, discharging stops above this SOC.

dispatch_time.name: Dispatch Duration
dispatch_time.description: How long the dispatch command runs in seconds before reverting to normal operation. Max 86400 (24 hours).

battery_mos_control.name: Battery MOS Control
battery_mos_control.description: Control the battery MOSFET switches. 'Normal' allows both charge and discharge. 'Charge Only' or 'Discharge Only' restricts the battery to one direction. The 'Disconnected' option (value 0) is blocked for safety to prevent accidental battery isolation.

time_period_control_flag.name: Time Period Control
time_period_control_flag.description: Enable or disable the timed charge/discharge schedule. When enabled, the battery charges and discharges according to the configured time periods.

dispatch_start.name: Dispatch Start
dispatch_start.description: Start or stop a dispatch operation. Set to 'On' to begin forcing the battery to charge or discharge at the configured power level.

dispatch_mode.name: Dispatch Mode
dispatch_mode.description: Operating mode for dispatch: Normal (automatic), Charge (force charge from grid), or Discharge (force discharge to home/grid).

dispatch_start_button.name: Start Dispatch
dispatch_start_button.description: Start a dispatch operation using the currently configured dispatch parameters (power, duration, mode, SOC limit). Writes all registers in the required sequence with Dispatch Mode written last, as required by the inverter.

dispatch_stop_button.name: Stop Dispatch
dispatch_stop_button.description: Stop the active dispatch operation. The inverter returns to normal automatic mode.
